title: Oru murai oru murai Lyrics Muppozhudhum Un Karpanaigal Song Lyrics
singerName: Andrea Jeremiah, Blaaze, GV Prakash Kumar
stanzas:
Singer:  G. V. Prakash Kumar, Blaaze, & Andrea
Song:  Oru Murai En Vizhigalai Paarayo
Lyrics: Thamarai
Music By : GV Prakash
Movie: Muppozhudhum Un Karpanaigal

Andhiyin veyyilai, pandhaduthe pei mazhai
Innilai solluthe, en kaadhalin vaanilai

oru murai oru murai, en vizhigalai paarayo
kanavugal kasindhida, adhu kadhaipadhai kelaayo
Paadhi kangalai moodugiren
meedhi kangalil thaedugiren
ullam puraamum unmugam
undhida kandaene

En nenjam engum pambukindra kaadhal
adhai sollivida vendum endru aaval
Ada enna vandhu sollvadhendru ketaal
enna seiven naan...

oru mottavilndha ottrai roja parthaen
En kattavilnda kaadhil solla ellum
adhai nambavillai nambavillai naanum
vaangavillai naan....

Palavarna vanna karkkal vaitha kaipai
nam peyargalai achchaditha koppai
ne thoongavendru kadha kadha porvai
thaedukindran naan....

Ne thottukena chirpi sangu tharavaa
Maan kutti padam muthucharam tharavaa
Thaen kutti pola thuvalthaangi tharavaa
enna naaan vaanga..

You got me empty on my pocket -stop it
You got me filling like a broke- oh no ..
face-o kili girl,... bommai girl
...make a feel incredible
i see the time, see the place, i wanna know
are you ready for my phone-callatic syllable...
ennadi time, ennadi place, ennadi show
are you ready for my phone-callatic syllable ..
gonna get her gonna get her, by my side
gonna get her gonna get her, in my life
gonna get her gonna get her, wrong or right
gonna get her gonna get her right right right (2) ..

Siripaai irukum unnaku veetil..
seyarkai aruvi tharalaam..
idhayam mulludhum eeram
adhanaal chedigal valarka tharalaam
azhagu seiyum saadhanam
vaanga thoandrum kaaranam
unnai serndha pinbudhaan
aliyum avatrin naanamum

Or pakkam vandhaal adhigamaai thudikkum
thallisendraal lapputhaappu adikkum
ada idhayathaai aval kayil thandhaal
enna seivaalo..

Unnai yendhi sella eppozhudhum irupaen
endru sollumpadi kaalanigal kodupen
orr thaevai endraal kaalmidhiyaai kidapaen
thaanginaal enna... ....................(Oru murai Oru ...)

ooooh..
what it is in your mind that you want too see
what can I get for you ..say
i give you parisu girl what ever parisu girl
you be my thulasi girl, you be so lovable
tell me what you like girl, tell me tell me what you like girl
tell me what you like girl, tell me tell me what you like girl
coz i would bring the moon down for you
and i would make them green turn too
and I would do whatever I do
and I would do will just for you ...

let me rewind,rewind, to a new time
bring the both chime, until you are mine

Unadhu periya padhathaal
arayin suvarai maraithu vidavaa..
Nilavin oliyil minnum mugathai
viralai neeti thodavaa...hey ...
Thajmahaal vaangalaam
sahjahanaai maaralaam
yerkavillai naan adhai
unnaku pinbu vazhvadhai ..

malar vetkangala romba romba alluppu..
viral modhirangal ippodhellaam salippu
ada thangathuku thanganagai edhukku
vaangavillai naan

aey.. ..oru murai oru murai, en vizhigalai paarayo
kanavugal kasindhida, adhu kadhaipadhai kelaayo

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep emotions of love and longing, capturing the essence of romantic relationships.

How does this song fit into the movie's plot?

In Muppozhudhum Un Karpanaigal, the song highlights the protagonist's feelings and experiences related to love.

Who are the singers and music director of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Andrea Jeremiah, Blaaze, and GV Prakash Kumar, with music composed by GV Prakash Kumar.

When was the song released?

Oru Murai Oru Murai was released on September 17, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Oru Murai Oru Murai, the characters experience a whirlwind of emotions as they navigate the complexities of love. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics beautifully convey the longing and desire that often accompany romantic relationships. Set against the backdrop of Muppozhudhum Un Karpanaigal, it encapsulates the essence of love's journey. The collaboration of Andrea Jeremiah, Blaaze, and GV Prakash Kumar adds a unique charm, making it a memorable piece in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oru Murai Oru Murai from Muppozhudhum Un Karpanaigal is a mesmerizing blend of soulful melodies and heartfelt lyrics. Featuring the unique collaboration of Andrea Jeremiah, Blaaze, and GV Prakash Kumar, this song captures the essence of love and longing. With GV Prakash's enchanting music and Thamarai's poignant lyrics, it’s a must-listen for anyone who cherishes romantic tunes.
stanzaMeanings: The dark clouds are pouring rain, and the present speaks of my love's sky.
Just once, just once, will you look into my eyes? Dreams are fading, is that the end of the story? I close half my eyes and search with my open eyes; I see your face inside my heart.
My heart is like a snake, it needs to express this love. When she asks me what I will say, what will I do?
I saw a rose blooming in a garden. I can't believe everything that is said in my heart. I can't believe it, I can't accept it either.
With many colors, I hold the pain of our names. I am searching for a story that won't let me sleep.
Will you give me a smile? Will you give me a sweet sound? Like a honey bee, will you come to me?

You got me empty in my pocket - stop it. You got me feeling broke - oh no. Face it, pretty girl, make me feel incredible. I see the time, see the place, I wanna know if you're ready for my call. What time, what place, what show? Are you ready for my call? Gonna get her by my side, gonna get her in my life, gonna get her right.
In your house, there is laughter. We can bring a stream of joy. The heart is like a thorn, but it can grow flowers. The reason for beauty is you, and after joining with you, I become complete.
If you come close, it will start to shine more. If you touch my heart, what will happen?
I will always be there for you, as I say. If you need something, I will be there for you.

What is it in your mind that you want to see? What can I get for you? I will give you whatever you want, girl. You be my beloved girl, so lovable. Tell me what you like, and I will bring the moon down for you and make everything green for you. I will do whatever it takes for you.
Let me rewind to a new time, bringing both of us together until you are mine.
Will you hide your big dreams behind a wall? Will you show your face that shines in the moonlight? Hey, let's get the Taj Mahal and make it beautiful for you.
The flowers are blooming beautifully. All the rings on your fingers are shining. I can't take them for the sake of my love.
Just once, just once, will you look into my eyes? Dreams are fading, is that the end of the story?
